title: FHIR Export
description: Export OMOP CDM data as FHIR R4 NDJSON files for interoperability with other healthcare systems. Select a data source and the FHIR resource types you want to export, then download the resulting NDJSON files when the job completes.
tips: Select the source ID of the OMOP CDM data source you want to export from, then choose which FHIR resource types to include.
Supported resource types include Patient, Condition, Encounter, Observation, MedicationStatement, Procedure, Immunization, and AllergyIntolerance.
Use the Select All / Deselect All toggle to quickly configure which resource types to include in the export.
The export runs as a background job. The status section polls every 3 seconds so you can watch progress in real time.
Once the export completes, download links appear for each resource type as individual NDJSON files with resource counts.
Each NDJSON file follows the FHIR Bulk Data specification, with one JSON resource per line for efficient streaming and processing.
If an export fails, the error message is displayed in the status section. Fix the issue and start a new export.
Click 'Start a new export' at the bottom of the status section to configure and run another export job.
